description: Account for building operations. Dating: (mentions expenses for a period from Elul 1466 to Shevaṭ 1467 Seleucid, so likely shortly after Shevaṭ 1467 Seleucid, which ended in January 1156 CE. Very damaged fragment of a leaf, in which several entries in an accounting of building operations are preserved. Dar al-Kāzarūnī is mentioned, also known from other documents. Data about plastering, building, and carpentry work are included. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 285 #58)
description_he: חשבון עבודות בנייה, אלול 1155 – ינואר 1156. כולל נתונים על טיח, בנייה ונגרות בדאר אל-כאזרוני.
